channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Safa NEC members challenge suspension and seek arbitration
item.description: Four South African Football Association (Safa) national executive committee members — Gladwyn White, Monde Montshiwa, Emma Hendricks, and Orapeleng Setlhare — are contesting their suspension following...

item.title: Trump’s shifting abortion stance sparks global concern over women’s healthcare
item.description: The article by Dr Lesley Russell analyses the political and social tensions surrounding Donald Trump’s evolving stance on abortion during his second term as President of the United States. While Trump...

item.title: Québec Solidaire calls for expert guidance amid rising grocery prices
item.description: Québec Solidaire has drawn attention to the ongoing concerns over grocery prices in the province, urging policymakers to rely on expert analysis when developing strategies to address rising costs. The...

item.title: ADC Confirms Expulsion of Several Members Over Disciplinary Issues
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don officially announce say dem don expel some members following the resolutions wey dem reach for National Convention wey hold on April 14, 2026, for Abuja. Bola...

item.title: Key provisions of the UK-US trade deal and its partial implementation
item.description: The UK and the United States reached a bilateral trade agreement in May 2025, the first such deal secured by the US following President Donald Trump’s return to office. In exchange for greater access ...

item.title: How to safely buy GLP‑1 weight‑loss drugs online and avoid risky compounded versions
item.description: Advertisements for GLP‑1 weight‑loss medications like Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro, Zepbound and Foundayo have surged across the internet, spurred in part by high‑profile ads such as the 2026 Super Bowl ...

item.title: Matt Baugh Assumes Role as New British High Commissioner to Kenya
item.description: Things are looking up! Matt Baugh, the new British High Commissioner to Kenya, has officially started work, and he’s promising a strong partnership. He took over from Neil Wigan, who’s now moved onto ...

item.title: VHP urges central law to address illegal religious conversions citing national security concerns
item.description: The Vishwa Hindu Parishad (VHP) has called for a comprehensive central law to curb illegal religious conversions, asserting that such practices pose a threat to national security. On Wednesday, VHP jo...

item.title: Environment Canada issues rainfall warnings for southern Ontario as heavy rain expected
item.description: Residents across southern Ontario are being advised to prepare for wet conditions as rain continues to affect the region. Environment Canada forecasts that areas stretching from Kitchener to Owen Soun...

item.title: Fela Anikulapo-Kuti inducted into Rock & Roll Hall of Fame as first Nigerian
item.description: Afrobeat legend Fela Anikulapo-Kuti don make history as him dey inducted into the Rock & Roll Hall of Fame, becoming the first Nigerian artist wey ever receive dis kain big recognition. Fela enter for...

item.title: Canberra Youth Justice Centre Faces Frequent Lockdowns Due to Staff Shortages
item.description: Over the past year, Canberra's Bimberi Youth Justice Centre has experienced 70 operational lockdowns, despite the facility never reaching full capacity. Of these, 68 occurred during lunchtime, largely...

item.title: How Online Learning Platforms Dey Shape Modern Career Certifications
item.description: For today’s fast-paced digital world, professional certifications don turn to one of the most important things wey fit help person move up for career. Employers dey look for people wey get verified sk...

item.title: Ripple survey shows 72% of finance leaders believe digital asset services are needed to stay competitive
item.description: Ripple’s 2026 global survey of over 1,000 finance leaders has showed that a large number of banks, asset managers, fintechs and corporate treasuries are now seeing digital assets as a key part of thei...

item.title: Sibabalwe Mahashe set to energise Lions in crucial Glasgow URC match
item.description: Sibabalwe Mahashe has quickly become a standout player for the Lions this season, showing remarkable promise despite being only six matches into his professional career. Making his debut in January ag...

item.title: Onanuga Replies Aregbesola’s Criticism of Tinubu’s Renewed Hope Agenda

item.title: IMF recommends Pakistan to eliminate fuel subsidies gradually and expand tax base for better fiscal health
item.description: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) in its Fiscal Monitor 2026 has urged Pakistan to phase out costly fuel subsidies, manage contingent liabilities and widen the tax base to ensure medium-term fisca...

item.title: Tragic school shooting in Turkiye leaves nine dead and 13 injured
item.description: In a very shocking incident in Turkiye, a school shooting took place on Wednesday in the Kahramanmaras province, marking the country’s second school shooting in just two days. A teenager, reportedly a...

item.title: Economists forecast tougher economic conditions for Australians amid Middle East conflict and global uncertainty
item.description: Economists have warned that Australians face significantly tougher economic conditions in the coming months due to the ongoing war in the Middle East, particularly the conflict affecting the Strait of...

item.title: Zanzibar President urges construction firms to integrate clean energy and modern transport
item.description: Zanzibar President Dr Hussein Mwinyi has emphasised the importance of modernising the islands' infrastructure while embracing clean energy solutions. Speaking in a special interview with TBC, he noted...

item.title: The Alibi Episode 21: Stella Chooses to End Agreement with Vincent
item.description: In the latest episode of the hit ABS-CBN teleserye 'The Alibi,' Stella Morales makes a firm decision that could change the course of her complicated relationship with Vincent Cabrera. After careful th...
